settings.title: Stripe routing
settings.description: Leave this blank to use the platform Stripe account with tenant metadata. Connect a tenant Stripe account to send future one-off and regular donations to that tenant account.
settings.stripe_connect_description: Changing this affects future donation checkouts. Re-sync support levels after adding a tenant account so recurring prices exist in that Stripe account.
settings.connect_fallback_active: A Stripe Connect account is configured, but it is not ready for live donations yet. Payments will use the platform fallback until onboarding is complete.

finance.title: Finance operations
finance.description: Track tenant Connect routing, platform fallback liability, Gift Aid readiness, disputes, and receipt follow-up for this tenant.
finance.empty: No finance activity has been recorded yet.
